hooks.command:
APPROVAL=/tmp/production-review-approved; if find "$APPROVAL" -mmin -10 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then rm -f "$APPROVAL"; exit 0; else echo 'BLOCKED: Production review required before committing.

Run the pre-commit skill:
  /pre-commit

This runs all 4 review agents in parallel (architecture, clean code, security/a11y, performance).
The skill creates /tmp/production-review-approved when all checks pass.'; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *"package-lock.json"* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never edit package-lock.json directly. Use npm install/uninstall instead.' && exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *".test."* ]]; then cd /Users/yoavsborovsky/Documents/GitHub/private-website && npm run test -- --run 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
